candidate_problems.text: Quantify which parts of the resistance system are truly load bearing by testing whether reducing selection pressure, transmission, or incentive misalignment yields the largest durable change in resistance-versus-invention rates.
Determine whether AI-assisted molecule discovery can materially change the overall asymmetry if paired with stewardship, surveillance, and incentive redesign rather than used in isolation.
Identify pathogen classes or care settings where the conjectured asymmetry breaks down and discovery can outpace resistance for sustained periods.
